comment: Demonstrates REPORT+TX3 reincarnation bug: we CQ, DX replies with grid (TX1), we enter REPORT state sending TX2. DX never responds (QRM), retries exhaust, context popped with snr_tx=-5 lost. DX then sends TX3 (R-08), creating a reincarnated context with snr_tx=-99. ADIF is logged with wrong rst_sent. BUG: no prior correct ADIF entry exists.

periods.comment: Period 1 (odd): DX replies to our CQ with TX1 (grid). snr=-5 is what we measure of DX.
Period 2 (even): We send TX2 (report: -5). REPORT state, retry 1/5.
Period 12 (even): TX2 final retry — tick exhausts retries, context POPPED. snr_tx=-5 is lost.
Period 13 (odd): DX finally sends TX3 (R-08). Propagation improved. No matching ctx → reincarnated context with snr_tx=-99. EXPECT BUG: ADIF logged with rst_sent=-99.
Period 14 (even): Reincarnated context sends TX4 (RR73). QSO logged with wrong rst_sent.
